token_family_docs.$description: Emphasis mode — design-hierarchy intensity (high / low). Each value holds the CSS class string the application adds to <body> (or a container) to activate that mode value. 'default' means the value is the base and needs no class; everything else is an explicit .ob-* class.

selector.$description: High is the base emphasis mode — no class is applied. It is the first-paint default; low overrides it via .ob-emphasis-low.
Developer-facing class. The application adds it to a container to activate low-emphasis colour resolution.
